subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Yesterday the sage wandered through the city with a lamp, saying: "Weary am I of demon and beast; for a human being do I yearn." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی دی شیخ با چراغ همی گشت گرد شهر کز دیو و دد ملولم و انسانم آرزوست
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @poems and quotation from poetry
